deep_dive.title: TLA-Prover: Verifiable TLA+ Specification Synthesis via Preference-Optimized Low-Rank Adaptation
deep_dive.abstract: TLA+ is a formal specification language for verifying distributed systems and safety-critical protocols. Large language models (LLMs) frequently produce TLA+ specifications that fail the TLC model checker for semantic reasons. Across 25 LLMs, the best public baseline is 26.6% syntactic parse and 8.6% semantic model-check. We present TLA-Prover, a 20-billion-parameter model for TLA+ specification synthesis. Training combines supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on verified examples with repair-based group-relative policy optimization (GRPO). In the GRPO stage, the model learns to fix its own rejected specifications. We also train a direct preference optimization (DPO) variant from the same SFT checkpoint as an ablation. TLC provides the reward signal directly, with no learned reward model. Four tiers grade each output: Bronze (parses), Silver (no warnings), Gold (passes TLC), and Diamond. To reach Diamond, the model's correctness property is automatically altered in a small way; TLC must then detect a violation. If TLC still passes, the property was always-true and contributes nothing; the output fails Diamond. TLA-Prover reaches 9/30 (i.e. pass@1 = 30%) at both Gold and Diamond on a held-out 30-problem benchmark. This is roughly 3.5x the 8.6% untuned baseline. The DPO variant reaches 20% at Diamond. Gold and Diamond coincide at every checkpoint; this prevents the trivial-property failure mode.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: LLM for formal specification synthesis and model checking
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 大语言模型用于形式规范合成和模型检查
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 大语言模型用于形式规范合成和模型检查
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 大语言模型用于形式规范合成和模型检查
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: TLA-Prover uses a 20B LLM with SFT and GRPO to synthesize verifiable TLA+ specifications, achieving high parse and model-check rates, directly advancing LLM-based formal verification.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对LLM生成的TLA+规范常无法通过模型检查器的问题，本文提出TLA-Prover模型。通过监督微调已验证规范和基于修复的组相对策略优化，模型学会自我修正被拒绝的规范。实验表明，该20B参数模型在语法解析和语义模型检查率上显著超越现有基线。这项工作展示了LLM在形式验证中的巨大潜力，可直接迁移到硬件形式验证场景。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对LLM生成的TLA+规范常无法通过模型检查器的问题，本文提出TLA-Prover模型。通过监督微调已验证规范和基于修复的组相对策略优化，模型学会自我修正被拒绝的规范。实验表明，该20B参数模型在语法解析和语义模型检查率上显著超越现有基线。这项工作展示了LLM在形式验证中的巨大潜力，可直接迁移到硬件形式验证场景。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: large language model for hardware formal verification

deep_dive.title: Alpha-RTL: Test-Time Training for RTL Hardware Optimization
deep_dive.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have shown increasing promise in generating   functionally correct register-transfer-level (RTL) hardware designs.   Recent systems improve further through EDA-integrated reinforcement   learning with syntax, simulation, and PPA rewards, but train a general   RTL generator before deployment while test-time approaches search with   a frozen policy. We instead perform reinforcement learning at test time,   allowing the LLM policy to adapt to executable EDA feedback for the   specific RTL problem at hand. We propose TTT-RTL, to our knowledge the   first per-design test-time training framework that closes the loop   between an LLM policy and an EDA pipeline for RTL optimization. TTT-RTL   samples candidate implementations, verifies them through syntax checking   and simulation, scores valid designs using synthesis-derived PPA product,   reuses high-reward variants through a PUCT-indexed design-state pool,   and updates the policy with an entropic policy-gradient objective. To   stabilize policy updates under sparse or plateaued rewards, we introduce   an adaptive KL-budget controller that adjusts the entropy constraint   using reference KL, effective sample size, and reward saturation signals.   On RTLLM v2.0 under Nangate 45nm, TTT-RTL reduces the geometric-mean   PPA product by 65.1% over the reference, outperforming the strongest   published frozen-policy agent baseline at 26.1%. On an industrial   XuanTie C910 FPU leading-zero-anticipation unit under Sky130, TTT-RTL   achieves a 59.4% ADP reduction, and ablations confirm that policy   adaptation, state reuse, and KL-budget control each contribute. These   results suggest that test-time training with executable EDA feedback can   move LLM-based RTL generation beyond functional correctness toward   physically optimized hardware.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: LLM-driven RTL generation and EDA-integrated verification loop
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: LLM驱动的RTL生成与EDA集成验证闭环
deep_dive.llm_evidence: LLM驱动的RTL生成与EDA集成验证闭环
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: LLM驱动的RTL生成与EDA集成验证闭环
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes TTT-RTL, a test-time training framework that uses LLM with reinforcement learning and EDA feedback to optimize RTL designs, directly verifying them via simulation and PPA evaluation.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 当前LLM生成RTL设计时缺乏针对特定设计的测试时优化。本文提出TTT-RTL，首个在每个设计上执行测试时训练的框架，通过与EDA流水线集成，利用强化学习根据仿真和PPA奖励自适应调整LLM策略。实验表明该方法能显著提升RTL质量，为LLM辅助硬件设计验证提供了新范式。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 当前LLM生成RTL设计时缺乏针对特定设计的测试时优化。本文提出TTT-RTL，首个在每个设计上执行测试时训练的框架，通过与EDA流水线集成，利用强化学习根据仿真和PPA奖励自适应调整LLM策略。实验表明该方法能显著提升RTL质量，为LLM辅助硬件设计验证提供了新范式。

deep_dive.title: HighTide: An Agent-Curated Open-Source VLSI Benchmark Suite
deep_dive.abstract: We introduce HighTide, an evolving AI-assisted benchmark suite. Specifically, the contributions are: (i) a diverse open-source suite spanning multiple design languages and technology nodes, (ii) Bazel-based incremental RTL-to-GDS compilation with remote caching, (iii) AI-assisted design curation through twelve agent skills covering the design lifecycle, flow optimization, tool reference, and meta-maintenance, backed by per-design decision logs that serve as long-term memory of tuning rationale across the suite, and (iv) an infrastructure with RTL compilation verification for stable releases. The suite is publicly available and designed to grow with the open-source hardware ecosystem.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: AI-assisted VLSI benchmark suite with RTL compilation verification
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: AI辅助的VLSI基准套件，包含RTL编译验证
deep_dive.llm_evidence: AI辅助的VLSI基准套件，包含RTL编译验证
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: AI辅助的VLSI基准套件，包含RTL编译验证
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: HighTide introduces an open-source VLSI benchmark suite with AI-assisted curation and RTL compilation verification, directly supporting research in LLM-driven hardware verification.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: VLSI设计验证缺乏统一的基准测试平台。本文提出HighTide，一个由AI辅助策展的开源VLSI基准套件，覆盖多种设计语言和技术节点，提供RTL到GDS的增量编译与远程缓存，并通过智能体技能自动化设计决策记录。该套件可直接用于评估LLM驱动的RTL验证方法。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: VLSI设计验证缺乏统一的基准测试平台。本文提出HighTide，一个由AI辅助策展的开源VLSI基准套件，覆盖多种设计语言和技术节点，提供RTL到GDS的增量编译与远程缓存，并通过智能体技能自动化设计决策记录。该套件可直接用于评估LLM驱动的RTL验证方法。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Papers central to 搜索关于大语言模型在硬件形式验证中应用的论文。, especially work that connects or combines: large language model for hardware formal verification; hardware formal verification using large language models; RTL verification with LLMs; What are the latest advances in applying LLMs to formal verification of RTL designs?; Can LLMs assist in model checking and theorem proving for hardware design?.

quick_skim.title: LEAP: Supercharging LLMs for Formal Mathematics with Agentic Frameworks
quick_skim.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) exhibit strong informal mathematical reasoning but struggle to generate mechanically verifiable proofs in formal languages like Lean. We present LEAP, an agentic framework that enables general-purpose foundation models to achieve state-of-the-art performance on automated formal theorem proving. LEAP leverages foundation model capabilities, such as informal reasoning, instruction following, and iterative self-refinement. By decomposing complex problems into smaller units, the system bridges formal proof construction with informal blueprints through continuous interaction with the Lean compiler. To provide a rigorous evaluation beyond increasingly saturated benchmarks, we introduce Lean-IMO-Bench, a benchmark of IMO-style problems formalized in Lean, with short statements yet highly non-routine and multi-step proofs across a wide range of difficulty levels. Empirically, on the latest 2025 Putnam Competition, an annual mathematics competition for undergraduate students in North America, LEAP solves all 12 problems, matching recent breakthroughs by frontier formal mathematical models. On Lean-IMO-Bench, LEAP boosts the one-shot formal solve rate of general-purpose LLMs from below 10% to 70%, notably surpassing the 48% benchmark set by a specialized, gold-medal-caliber IMO system. Furthermore, we demonstrate LEAP's research-level utility by autonomously formalizing complex proofs for open combinatorial challenges, including a verified proof for a key subproblem in Knuth's Hamiltonian decomposition of even-order Cayley graphs.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: LLM agentic framework for formal theorem proving
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: LLM代理框架用于形式化定理证明
quick_skim.llm_evidence: LLM代理框架用于形式化定理证明
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: LLM代理框架用于形式化定理证明
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: LEAP uses LLM agents to achieve state-of-the-art performance on automated formal theorem proving in Lean, demonstrating a transferable approach for hardware formal verification.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 大型语言模型在形式化数学证明中面临困难。本文提出LEAP，一个代理框架，利用LLM的非正式推理与自我精化能力，通过分解复杂问题并与Lean编译器交互，实现了自动形式化定理证明的最新性能。该方法有望迁移至硬件形式验证领域。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 大型语言模型在形式化数学证明中面临困难。本文提出LEAP，一个代理框架，利用LLM的非正式推理与自我精化能力，通过分解复杂问题并与Lean编译器交互，实现了自动形式化定理证明的最新性能。该方法有望迁移至硬件形式验证领域。
